scripts.content:sync: bun -e "import { openMarlothWriteContext, resolveContentPath, defaultDbPathForContent } from 'marloth-db/content'; const c=resolveContentPath(); const ctx=openMarlothWriteContext(c, defaultDbPathForContent(c)); ctx.sync.fullRebuild(); ctx.db.close(); console.log('Synced', c);"
scripts.test: bun test packages/marloth-db/src && bun test packages/notion-metadata-sync/src && bun run --cwd packages/marloth-editor test && bun run --cwd packages/marloth-static-site test
